sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58391" key="koinobouleutiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κοινοβουλ-ευτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n58391.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">deliberative</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hippod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.1.94</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
